name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-28
title: Step 6 IMPLEMENT does not commit implementation between iterations
description: Step 6 IMPLEMENT loops iterations until tests pass but never tells the subagent to git-add or git-commit the implementation files. At Step 9 UNLOCK the prompt only commits feature.json. The dispatchers HANDOFF collection assumes the impl commit exists (impl_commit field, IMPL_SHA in close calls), but the assembled prompt nowhere creates one. Add explicit git add and commit for implementation files before Step 7.

history.note: Fixed as part of Wave 1 bundle in PR (BUG-15/18/22/28/29 all addressed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt edits).
